zh.Pont-l'Abbé, Finistère, Bretagne, France: 法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾朋吉利阿貝
zh.La Roche-Derrien, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittan: 法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫拉 洛-德利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Malestroit於1260年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓時，她的父親Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont31歲，母親Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas25歲。她於大約1275年與Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.La Roche-Derrien, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittan: 法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫拉 洛-德利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Malestroit于1260年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓时，她的父亲Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont31岁，母亲Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas25岁。她于大约1275年与Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Malestroit was born in 1260, in Morbihan, Brittany, France, her father, Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont, was 31 and her mother, Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas, was 25. She married Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé about 1275, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Malestroit est née en 1260, à Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé environ 1275, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Malestroit 1260 in Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont 31 und ihre Mutter Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas 25. Sie hat um 1275 in Frankreich Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Malestroit è nata il nel 1260 nel Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé circa 1275, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie.

ja.Morbihan, Bretagne, France: フランスブレタグンモービハン
ja.La Roche-Derrien, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittan: フランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーラ ロチェ-デリーン
ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Malestroitが1260年にフランスブレタグンモービハンで生まれた時，父Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumontは31歳，母Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédasは25歳であった。約1275年にフランスでGeoffroy de Pont-L'abbéと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Malestroit(이)가 1260년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1275년 프랑스에서 Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Malestroit nasceu em 1260, em Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé aproximadamente 1275, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Malestroit родилась в 1260 г. в местности морбихань, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé около 1275 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Malestroit nació en 1260, en Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Chevalier Payen III de MALESTROIT Seigneur de Malestroit , de Largoet et de Beaumont, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Guilderc de Nevet Dame du Plessis-Kaër-de-Crec'h , de Kérambourg, de Roguédas, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Geoffroy de Pont-L'abbé aproximadamente 1275, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas.
